allow: Bash(mkdir -p src/components/Hero src/components/Skills src/components/Contact src/components/Navbar src/data)

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Linkedin:', 'Linkedin' in l, 'LinkedinIcon:', 'LinkedinIcon' in l\); console.log\('Github:', 'Github' in l, 'GithubIcon:', 'GithubIcon' in l\)")
